hooks.command: REPO=/home/user/WhisperNote; BRANCH=$(git -C "$REPO" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "main" ] && git -C "$REPO" checkout main && git -C "$REPO" pull origin main --ff-only 2>/dev/null; git -C "$REPO" merge --no-ff "$BRANCH" -m "Auto-merge $BRANCH into main" && git -C "$REPO" push origin main && git -C "$REPO" checkout "$BRANCH" || git -C "$REPO" checkout "$BRANCH" 2>/dev/null || true
